$doc: Claude Code delivery map for bin/leos-link.py (symlinks) + bin/leos-merge.py (fragments). 'links' are file/dir symlinks from the tool home into the leos-agent clone; 'merges' are files Claude Code rewrites, so they are merged not linked. Paths under `src` are clone-relative; `dest` is under $HOME.

links.note: bare symlink; Claude reads it as CLAUDE.md

machineLocal.note: native=Opus subagent + external roster {GPT,GLM,Gemini,Grok}; written at setup
